From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Former duchy in Poland

For the state established during the Napoleonic Wars, see [Duchy of Warsaw](/wiki/Duchy_of_Warsaw "Duchy of Warsaw").

| |  |  | | --- | --- | | **Preceded by** | **Succeeded by** | | |  |  | | --- | --- | |  | [Duchy of Masovia](/wiki/Duchy_of_Masovia "Duchy of Masovia") | | |  |  | | --- | --- | | [Duchy of Masovia](/wiki/Duchy_of_Masovia "Duchy of Masovia") |  | | [Duchy of Czersk](/wiki/Duchy_of_Czersk "Duchy of Czersk") |  | | | |

The **Duchy of Warsaw**[[a]](#cite_note-1) was a [feudal](/wiki/Feudalism "Feudalism") [district duchy](/wiki/District_duchy "District duchy") in [Masovia](/wiki/Masovia "Masovia"), centered on the [Warsaw Land](/wiki/Warsaw_Land "Warsaw Land"). Its capital was [Warsaw](/wiki/Warsaw "Warsaw").[[1]](#cite_note-one-2)

The state was established in 1310, in the partition of the [Duchy of Masovia](/wiki/Duchy_of_Masovia "Duchy of Masovia"), with duke [Siemowit II of Masovia](/wiki/Siemowit_II_of_Masovia "Siemowit II of Masovia") becoming its first leader.[[1]](#cite_note-one-2) It existed until 5 November 1370, when, under the rule of duke [Siemowit III](/wiki/Siemowit_III,_Duke_of_Masovia "Siemowit III, Duke of Masovia"), duchies of [Czersk](/wiki/Duchy_of_Czersk "Duchy of Czersk"), [Rawa](/wiki/Duchy_of_Rawa "Duchy of Rawa"), and Warsaw were unified into the [Duchy of Masovia](/wiki/Duchy_of_Masovia "Duchy of Masovia").[[2]](#cite_note-3)[[3]](#cite_note-4) It was again re-established in June 1381, in the partition of the Duchy of Masovia, with duke [Janusz I of Warsaw](/wiki/Janusz_I_of_Warsaw "Janusz I of Warsaw") as its first leader.[[4]](#cite_note-5)[[5]](#cite_note-6)[[6]](#cite_note-7) It existed until 1488, when it got incorporated into the [Duchy of Czersk](/wiki/Duchy_of_Czersk "Duchy of Czersk").[[7]](#cite_note-8)

From 1310 to 1320, it was a [fiefdom](/wiki/Fief "Fief") within the [Kingdom of Poland](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Poland_(1300%E2%80%931320) "Kingdom of Poland (1300–1320)"), and from 1320 to 1385, a fiefdom of the [United Kingdom of Poland](/wiki/United_Kingdom_of_Poland "United Kingdom of Poland"), and from 1386 to 1488, a fiefdom of the [Crown of the Kingdom of Poland](/wiki/Crown_of_the_Kingdom_of_Poland "Crown of the Kingdom of Poland").

## List of rulers

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Duchy_of_Warsaw_(Middle_Ages)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: List of rulers")]

### First state

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Duchy_of_Warsaw_(Middle_Ages)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: First state")]

* [Siemowit II of Masovia](/wiki/Siemowit_II_of_Masovia "Siemowit II of Masovia") (1310–1313)
* [Trojden I](/wiki/Trojden_I,_Duke_of_Masovia "Trojden I, Duke of Masovia") (1313–1341)
* [Siemowit III](/wiki/Siemowit_III,_Duke_of_Masovia "Siemowit III, Duke of Masovia") and [Casimir I of Warsaw](/wiki/Casimir_I_of_Warsaw "Casimir I of Warsaw") (1341–1349)
* [Casimir I of Warsaw](/wiki/Casimir_I_of_Warsaw "Casimir I of Warsaw") (1349–1355)
* [Siemowit III](/wiki/Siemowit_III,_Duke_of_Masovia "Siemowit III, Duke of Masovia") (1355–1370)

### Second state

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Duchy_of_Warsaw_(Middle_Ages)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Second state")]

* [Janusz I of Warsaw](/wiki/Janusz_I_of_Warsaw "Janusz I of Warsaw") (1381–1429)
* [Bolesław IV of Warsaw](/wiki/Boles%C5%82aw_IV_of_Warsaw "Bolesław IV of Warsaw") (1429–1454) ([Anna Fiodorówna](/w/index.php?title=Anna_Fiodor%C3%B3wna&action=edit&redlink=1 "Anna Fiodorówna (page does not exist)") [[pl](https://pl.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anna_Fiodor%C3%B3wna "pl:Anna Fiodorówna")] as the [regent](/wiki/Regent "Regent") from 1429 to 1436)
* [Casimir III of Płock](/wiki/Casimir_III_of_P%C5%82ock "Casimir III of Płock"), [Konrad III Rudy](/wiki/Konrad_III_Rudy "Konrad III Rudy"), and [Bolesław V of Warsaw](/wiki/Boles%C5%82aw_V_of_Warsaw "Bolesław V of Warsaw") (1454) ([Barbara Aleksandrówna](/wiki/Barbara_Aleksandr%C3%B3wna "Barbara Aleksandrówna") and [Paweł Giżycki](/w/index.php?title=Pawe%C5%82_Gi%C5%BCycki_(bishop)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Paweł Giżycki (bishop) (page does not exist)") [[pl](https://pl.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pawe%C5%82_Gi%C5%BCycki_(biskup) "pl:Paweł Giżycki (biskup)")] as regents)
* [Casimir III of Płock](/wiki/Casimir_III_of_P%C5%82ock "Casimir III of Płock"), [Konrad III Rudy](/wiki/Konrad_III_Rudy "Konrad III Rudy"), [Bolesław V of Warsaw](/wiki/Boles%C5%82aw_V_of_Warsaw "Bolesław V of Warsaw") and [Janusz II of Płock](/wiki/Janusz_II_of_P%C5%82ock "Janusz II of Płock") (1455–1471) ([Barbara Aleksandrówna](/wiki/Barbara_Aleksandr%C3%B3wna "Barbara Aleksandrówna") and Paweł Giżycki as regents from 1455 to 1462)
* [Bolesław V of Warsaw](/wiki/Boles%C5%82aw_V_of_Warsaw "Bolesław V of Warsaw") (1471–1481)
